query:
INSERT INTO sales (id, companyId, propertyId, buyerName, saleDate, saleValue, status, createdAt) 
SELECT CONCAT('sales_', id), companyId, CONCAT('prop_', id), 'Buyer', saleDate, salePrice, 'completed', createdAt 
FROM historicalSales 
WHERE companyId = 'company_test_001';
